name: pi-bedrock-mantle
description: Pi extension: all Bedrock Mantle models (GPT-5.5, DeepSeek, Qwen3, Mistral, Kimi, ...) via SigV4 — no long-term API key needed
author: Sam Fanning

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc --noEmit false --outDir dist --rootDir .
scripts.test: rm -rf .tmp-test && tsc --noEmit false --outDir .tmp-test --rootDir . && BEDROCK_MANTLE_LOG_FILE= BEDROCK_MANTLE_EMPTY_DUMP_DIR= node --test test/*.test.mjs
